speaker: Astronaut
text: Ugh... my head. Computer, where are we?

speaker: AI
text: Warning: Unscheduled landing complete. We are on Mars.

speaker: Astronaut
text: Mars?! How did we end up here?

speaker: AI
text: Navigation failure. Auxiliary battery levels are at 0%.

speaker: Astronaut
text: Great. I need to go look for a replacement.
